content: agent1: implementing 'Add Token Frequency Analysis' feature - adding analyze_frequency param to encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Will touch tiktoken/core.py only (likely the encode method).

agent1: done - added analyze_frequency (bool, default False) keyword-only param to encode() in tiktoken/core.py. When True, returns tuple(tokens, freq_dict) instead of just tokens list. Only touched the encode() method body/signature/docstring - didn't touch encode_ordinary/encode_batch/encode_to_numpy. Should be a small diff to merge with your transformers param if needed.
